return(function(v,a,m,f,V,L,d,O,I,G,H,h,r,D,t,c,j,B,z,p,b)G,I,z,H,t,r,h,c,j,b,D,B,p,O=function(G,m,f,V)local ns,Y,F,s,K,C,l,g,e,T,P,q,u,N,J,Z,k,A,S,d,Q,w,E,i,p,ms,D,as,Gs,M,o,y,vs,X,x,W,U,I,B,R while
